title: Chithirai Nela Lyrics Kadal Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Chithirai Nela
Singer : Vijay Yesudas
Lyrics: Vairamuthu
MOvie: Kadal
Music: AR Rahman

Chithirai => the first month of the Tamil year or calender		 .Other Songs Lyrics
1. Nenjukulle - in tamil english
2. Eley Keehen
3. Adiye Adiye
4. Moongil Thottam
5. Chithirai Nela
6. Magudi Magudi
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Chithirai Nela, orey nela
parandha vaano, padacha kadavulu
yellaamey othayila nikudhudey
nee kooda othayila nikkuradey
ettu vai makkaa
ettu vachu aagaasam thottuvai makkaa (2)

Manidhan ninaithaal vazhi pirkkum
manadhilirundhu ozhi pirakkum
pudhaikindra vidhayum
muyarchi kondaalthaan
boomiyum kooda thazh thirakkum

ettu vai makkaa
ettu vachu aagaasam thottuvai makkaa

Kannagalil irundhey kaatchigal thondrum
kalangalil irundhey dhesangal thondrum
thuyarathil irundhey kaaviyam thondrum
thozhviyil irundhey niyanangal thondrum

Sooriyan maraindhaal vizhakondru sirikkum
thonigal kavildhaal kilai ondru kidaikum

Chithirai Nela, orey nela
ettu vai makkaa
ettu vachu aagaasam thottuvai makkaa

Maram ondru vilundhaal ,
marupadi thazhaikkum.
manam indri villundhaal ,
yaar solli nadakum.
boomiyai thirandhaal ,
pudhayaalum irukkum.
pookalai thirandhaal ,
thaenthuli irukkum.

Nadhiglai thirandhaal
kadavigal selikkum.
nalayai thirandhaal
nambikkai sirikkum.

Chithirai Nela, orey nela
Chithirai Nela, orey nela
adho adho orey nela..		 English Translation
I tried my best :)
Chithirai Moon, only one moon
widespread sky, created GOD
everything is standing alone, child,
you too standing alone, child
try walking child
walk to touch the sky, child (2)

if human decides, a way will open
a light will come from mind.
only if a seeded seed try
to come up,
earth will open doors for it.

try walking, child
walk to touch the sky, child

seen will raise from eyes
country’s will appear from battle field
poem will appear from affliction
knowledge will come from lose

if sunsets, a lamp will laugh
if a raft submerge,we will get a branch

Chithirai Moon, only one moon
try walking child
walk to touch the sky, child (2)

if a tree falls,
it will bloom again.
if we fall depressed,
how it will raise to walk?
if Earth is opened ,
treasure will be there.
if flowers are opened,
honey will be there.

if river is opened,
every living being will live.
if tomorrow is opened,
self confidence will raise.

Chithirai Moon, only one moon
Chithirai Moon, only one moon
there, there .. only one moon

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Chithirai Nela'?

The song 'Chithirai Nela' celebrates the beauty of love and the emotions associated with it, using the metaphor of the first month of the Tamil calendar.

What is the context of this song in the movie Kadal?

In Kadal, 'Chithirai Nela' reflects the romantic journey of the characters, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Vijay Yesudas and composed by AR Rahman, known for his exceptional musical compositions.

When was 'Chithirai Nela' released?

'Chithirai Nela' was released on December 15, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Chithirai Nela', the lyrical beauty and melodic charm come together to create a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. The song encapsulates the feelings of love and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. With its soothing tune and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track stands out as a highlight in the film Kadal, showcasing the emotional depth of the characters' journey.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chithirai Nela from Kadal is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the soulful voice of Vijay Yesudas and the enchanting music of AR Rahman, this song transports listeners to a world of emotional depth. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add a layer of richness, making it a must-listen for any music lover.
stanzaMeanings: Chithirai Moon, only one moon widespread in the sky, created by God. Everything stands alone, child, you too stand alone, child. Try walking, child, walk to touch the sky, child. (2) If a human decides, a way will open. A light will come from the mind. Only if a seeded seed tries to come up, the earth will open doors for it. Try walking, child, walk to touch the sky, child.
